measures.title: Parks and Recreation Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a six-year county-wide levy for parks and recreation.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Jefferson County Fire Protection District No. 2 (Quilcene Fire Rescue)
measures.title: Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the fire district's regular levy lid.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Jefferson County Fire Protection District No. 4 (Brinnon Fire Department)
measures.title: Regular Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Restores the fire district's regular levy with a 104% limit factor for nine years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Jefferson County Fire Protection District No. 4 (Brinnon Fire Department)
measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes an EMS levy with a 104% limit factor for nine years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Jefferson County Cemetery District No. 2 (Quilcene Cemetery)
measures.title: Regular Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a regular levy for cemetery maintenance.
